name: PLAID,Inc.
summary: PLAID, Inc. develops and operates KARTE, a cloud-based customer experience (CX) platform in Japan. Its CX platform analyzes the behavior of customers who use websites and apps and realizes tailored communication to customers. The company also engages in the planning and management of EC-specialized media, Shopping Tribe; and CX-specialized media, XD. It serves finance/insurance, human resources, wholesale/retail/merchandise, apparel/sports/outdoors, real estate, IT services, media and digital content, travel/transportation, manufacturer, and healthcare and education industries. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
